antithesis_summary: Use full-window attention throughout because global coverage may matter more than local efficiency once value embeddings are gone.
label: Locality vs global context
thesis_summary: Keep the mixed `SSSL` attention pattern because it preserves throughput while still forcing a full-context pass each cycle.
why_active: The current branch baseline inherits the mixed `SSSL` pattern from the archived winner, but removing value embeddings may change how much the model relies on periodic full-context refresh. This branch still needs to learn whether the mixed pattern is essential or just a throughput convenience.
